productDisplayName: Playboy Women Play It Sexy Perfume
description: Play It Sexy perfume for women from playboy is an exciting feminine fragrance in a delectable bottle with the bunny ear shaped top with a bow. Opening notes are pink grapefruit, mandarin and pink pepper with a heart of jasmine tea, scented flowers and licorice. The base has vanilla, patchouli, sandalwood and tonka bean notes.Quantity: 75 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
